requirements.summary: Add a proxyUrl React Query mutation in useQueries.ts that calls the backend proxyUrl actor method and returns the proxied content for rendering
acceptanceCriteria: A useProxyUrl mutation (or equivalent) is defined in useQueries.ts.
It calls the backend actor's proxyUrl method with the given URL.
On success, it returns the proxied HTML content.
On error, it surfaces an error message usable by the UI.

file_operations.description: Add a useProxyUrl mutation that calls the backend actor's proxyUrl method with the provided URL string. The mutation should return the proxied HTML content on success and surface error messages on failure. This mutation will be consumed by BrowserLayout to handle direct URL navigation.

requirements.summary: Wire the direct URL proxy mutation into BrowserLayout.tsx so that entering a URL in the address bar triggers proxyUrl and renders the returned content in ProxyContent
acceptanceCriteria: Entering a valid URL in the address bar and submitting triggers the proxy mutation, not a search.
The proxied HTML is passed to ProxyContent for iframe rendering.
Loading and error states are reflected in the tab bar and UI.
The address bar URL is updated to reflect the navigated URL after successful proxy.

file_operations.description: Integrate the useProxyUrl mutation into the navigation flow. When the user enters a URL (detected by AddressBar logic) and submits, call the proxyUrl mutation instead of the search mutation. On success, pass the proxied HTML content to ProxyContent for iframe rendering and update the active tab's URL and content state. Reflect loading and error states in the tab bar and UI. Ensure the address bar URL updates to the navigated URL after successful proxy.
